creator: exploringlondon
caption:
This is London’s oldest restaurant, established in 1798! The walls are covered with paintings and photos, newspaper articles and more, making it feel like a museum and it’s such an experience dining amongst it all. The menu is traditional British and they do have a vegetarian menu if you request it (although limited).

📍 @rules_restaurant, 35 Maiden Ln, London WC2E 7LB

#londonsoldestrestaurant
